entities.woman: a woman looking at photos on a mantel
entities.puppy_photo: a framed photo of a tiny puppy
entities.dog: a large adult golden retriever lying at her feet

scenes.title: The Photo Mantel
scenes.background_prompt: A living room with a fireplace, a wooden mantel with framed photos, a soft rug, and warm lamp light. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A warm living room in soft lamp light. A woman in a cozy gray sweater stands in front of a fireplace mantel, looking at a row of framed photos arranged chronologically from left to right. The leftmost frame shows a tiny golden retriever puppy, barely a few weeks old, fitting in someone's cupped hands. The next shows the same puppy a bit bigger, chewing a shoe. The third shows an adolescent dog with gangly legs at a park. The rightmost shows a large, dignified adult golden retriever sitting proudly. At the woman's feet on the soft rug, that same golden retriever — now fully grown with a broad chest and wise eyes — lies with its chin on its paws, looking up at her. The passage of time is unmistakable across the photos. A warm fire crackles in the fireplace.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place woman standing in front of the fireplace mantel, looking at the row of framed photos. Place dog on the soft rug at her feet, lying with chin on paws, looking up at her.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground on the left, a woman with curly brown hair stands in profile facing right; she wears a green long-sleeved sweater, yellow-tan trousers, and brown ankle boots, holding a pair of black-rimmed glasses in her left hand while pointing her right index finger toward the fireplace. To her right, a golden-furred dog lies on a large brown patterned rug with a dark brown fringed border, looking up at the woman with a pleasant expression. Behind the woman, a large fireplace constructed of grey stones contains glowing orange and yellow flames behind a black metal grate holding wooden logs. The fireplace is topped with a thick, light-brown wooden mantel. On the far left of the mantel sits a small green plant in a white patterned pot, followed by a framed photo of a mountain, a larger framed photo of a family of four, a smaller framed puppy_photo featuring two dogs, two stacked books in blue and green, and a small lit candle in a round glass holder. Above the mantel on the light-patterned wallpapered wall hangs a large, empty brown picture frame. To the right of the fireplace stands a small dark-brown wooden side table with a single drawer, upon which sits a lamp with a tan base and a blue lampshade emitting a warm yellow glow. To the right of the side table, a large brown-framed window reveals a sunny outdoor scene featuring a green lawn with small white and pink flowers, a large green tree, and a blue sky filled with fluffy white clouds.
